// Do not edit this file manually.

import { z } from "zod";

export const article_statusSchema = z.enum(["draft", "published", "archived"]);
export type article_status = z.infer<typeof article_statusSchema>;

export const priority_levelSchema = z.enum([
  "low",
  "medium",
  "high",
  "critical",
]);
export type priority_level = z.infer<typeof priority_levelSchema>;

export const article_idSchema = z.number().int().brand<"article_id">();
export type article_id = z.infer<typeof article_idSchema>;
export const article_tag_idSchema = z.number().int().brand<"article_tag_id">();
export type article_tag_id = z.infer<typeof article_tag_idSchema>;
export const big_number_idSchema = z.string().brand<"big_number_id">();
export type big_number_id = z.infer<typeof big_number_idSchema>;
export const category_idSchema = z.number().int().brand<"category_id">();
export type category_id = z.infer<typeof category_idSchema>;
export const event_idSchema = z.number().int().brand<"event_id">();
export type event_id = z.infer<typeof event_idSchema>;
export const file_idSchema = z.string().uuid().brand<"file_id">();
export type file_id = z.infer<typeof file_idSchema>;
export const int_array_idSchema = z.number().int().brand<"int_array_id">();
export type int_array_id = z.infer<typeof int_array_idSchema>;
export const location_idSchema = z.number().int().brand<"location_id">();
export type location_id = z.infer<typeof location_idSchema>;
export const product_idSchema = z.number().int().brand<"product_id">();

export const profile_idSchema = z.number().int().brand<"profile_id">();
export type profile_id = z.infer<typeof profile_idSchema>;
export const setting_idSchema = z.number().int().brand<"setting_id">();
export type setting_id = z.infer<typeof setting_idSchema>;
export const tag_idSchema = z.number().int().brand<"tag_id">();
export type tag_id = z.infer<typeof tag_idSchema>;
export const text_array_idSchema = z.number().int().brand<"text_array_id">();
export type text_array_id = z.infer<typeof text_array_idSchema>;

export const schema = {
  article: {
    tableName: "article",
    types: {
      article_id: article_idSchema,
      body: z.string().nullable(),
      category_id: category_idSchema,
      priority: priority_levelSchema,
      profile_id: profile_idSchema.nullable(),
      published: z.boolean(),
      status: article_statusSchema,
      title: z.string(),
      view_count: z.number().int(),
    },
    notNullTypes: {
      article_id: article_idSchema,
      body: z.string(),
      category_id: category_idSchema,
      priority: priority_levelSchema,
      profile_id: profile_idSchema,
      published: z.boolean(),
      status: article_statusSchema,
      title: z.string(),
      view_count: z.number().int(),

    tableName: "event",
    types: {
      ends_at: z.date().nullable(),
      event_date: z.date().nullable(),
      event_id: event_idSchema,
      local_start: z.date().nullable(),
      name: z.string(),
      starts_at: z.date(),
    },
    notNullTypes: {
      ends_at: z.date(),
      event_date: z.date(),

        name: z.string(),
        starts_at: z.date(),
      })
      .strict(),
  },
  file: {
    tableName: "file",
    types: {
      content: z.instanceof(Uint8Array),
      file_id: file_idSchema,
      name: z.string(),
      object_oid: z.number().nullable(),
    },
    notNullTypes: {
      content: z.instanceof(Uint8Array),
      file_id: file_idSchema,

    types: {
      int_array_id: int_array_idSchema,
      name: z.string(),

    notNullTypes: {
      int_array_id: int_array_idSchema,

    tableName: "setting",
    types: {

      .strict(),

};

type Schemas = typeof schema;
type RowTypes = {
  [K in keyof Schemas]: Schemas[K]["types"] & {
    notNull: Schemas[K]["notNullTypes"];
  };
};

export const rowTypes: RowTypes = Object.fromEntries(
  Object.entries(schema).map(([key, value]) => [
    key,
    { ...value.types, notNull: value.notNullTypes },
  ]),
) as unknown as RowTypes;

export type articleType = z.infer<typeof schema.article.validator>;
export type articleTypeNotNull = z.infer<
  typeof schema.article.notNullValidator
>;
export type article_tagType = z.infer<typeof schema.article_tag.validator>;
export type article_tagTypeNotNull = z.infer<
  typeof schema.article_tag.notNullValidator
>;

export type big_numberTypeNotNull = z.infer<
  typeof schema.big_number.notNullValidator
>;
export type categoryType = z.infer<typeof schema.category.validator>;
export type categoryTypeNotNull = z.infer<
  typeof schema.category.notNullValidator
>;
export type eventType = z.infer<typeof schema.event.validator>;
export type eventTypeNotNull = z.infer<typeof schema.event.notNullValidator>;

export type fileTypeNotNull = z.infer<typeof schema.file.notNullValidator>;
export type int_arrayType = z.infer<typeof schema.int_array.validator>;
export type int_arrayTypeNotNull = z.infer<
  typeof schema.int_array.notNullValidator
>;
export type locationType = z.infer<typeof schema.location.validator>;
export type locationTypeNotNull = z.infer<
  typeof schema.location.notNullValidator
>;
export type productType = z.infer<typeof schema.product.validator>;
export type productTypeNotNull = z.infer<
  typeof schema.product.notNullValidator
>;
export type profileType = z.infer<typeof schema.profile.validator>;
export type profileTypeNotNull = z.infer<
  typeof schema.profile.notNullValidator
>;
export type settingType = z.infer<typeof schema.setting.validator>;
export type settingTypeNotNull = z.infer<
  typeof schema.setting.notNullValidator
>;
export type tagType = z.infer<typeof schema.tag.validator>;
export type tagTypeNotNull = z.infer<typeof schema.tag.notNullValidator>;
export type text_arrayType = z.infer<typeof schema.text_array.validator>;
export type text_arrayTypeNotNull = z.infer<
  typeof schema.text_array.notNullValidator
>;

export const article = rowTypes.article;
export const article_tag = rowTypes.article_tag;

export const category = rowTypes.category;
